about.summary: Passionate developer with 2 years of experience in software engineering and 3 years prior in a non-tech manufacturing role. I specialize in building internal tools, automating workflows, and creating data pipelines and dashboards for business teams. Currently focused on backend development, with a strong interest in systems design and scalable software.

experience.description: Developing internal tools, softwares, data driven insights for internal clients
highlights: Architected a new dashboard that reduced page load time by 40%
Mentored 3 junior developers on best practices
Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time by 60%

experience.description: Operating CNC, VMC Machines, inspecting part quality
highlights: Built REST API handling 10K+ daily requests
Developed responsive frontend components using React
Senior project: Machine learning-based recommendation system
